    Testing Math and Syntax Highlighting

    January 01, 2026

    Math Rendering

    Here is an inline math example: $E = mc^2$.

    And a block math example:

    \[\int_{a}^{b} x^2 \, dx = \frac{b^3 - a^3}{3}\]

    Syntax Highlighting

    def hello_world():
    print("Hello, Minimalist World!")
    return True

    const toggleDarkMode = () => {
  document.body.classList.toggle('dark-mode');
};
